song_name: Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go

versions.song_name: Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go
Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go
Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go
versions.version_description: Complete version of this Wham number one record from 1984,play with Clean electric guitar with reverb and chorus effects or simply acoustic guitar.You Tube link https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pIgZ7gMze7A.

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

recommended.song_name: I Just Called To Say I Love You

[Intro]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C7[/ch]|   [ch]C7[/ch]        (palm mute x2)|
        Jitterbug                  x4[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
You put the boom-boom into my heart[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
You send my soul sky high when your lovin' starts[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Jitterbug into my brain[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
Goes a bang-bang-bang 'til my feet do the same[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]
But something's bugging you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]
Something ain't right[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]                        |[ch]Em7add11[/ch]   [ch]G/A[/ch]|
My best friend told me what you   did last night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]              [ch]Em7[/ch]
Left me sleepin' in my bed[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                    |[ch]Em/G[/ch]        [ch]F/G[/ch]       [ch]Em/G[/ch]   [ch]F/G[/ch]|   [ch]G6[/ch]
I was dreaming, but I should have been with you  instead.[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]
You take the grey skies out of my way[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Dm7[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]                  |[ch]Em9[/ch]     [ch]G/A[/ch]|
